items.title: Fix bundled channel dist-runtime setup roots
items.summary: Fix bundled channel dist-runtime setup roots * Fix bundled channel dist-runtime setup roots Resolve bundled channel generated entries from dist-runtime before falling back to source paths, and select the dist-runtime plugin root as the boundary root for packaged setup modules. This keeps the fs-safe module open boundary check intact while preventing packaged bundled setup entries from being checked against the source extensions root. Co-authored-by: Copilot * Repair session store validation test fixtures Update current-main tests that wrote persisted session entries without valid session IDs after session store loading started filtering invalid entries. Keep the fixture-only repair separate from the bundled channel loader fix. Co-authored-by: Copilot * Repair pairing and cron validation fixtures Co-authored-by: Copilot --------- Co-authored-by: Copilot
